idea-plugin.name: Uyava Desktop Launcher
idea-plugin.description: One-click launcher that finds a running Flutter/Dart VM Service and opens Uyava Desktop Pro with the project context. The plugin works locally, has no telemetry/analytics, and does not send project data or personal data to third-party services.

action.description: Launch or attach Uyava Desktop Pro to the active Flutter/Dart VM Service
